title: Maintain a Meat Hygiene Assessment program
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Maintain a Meat Hygiene Assessment program demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Oversee carcase meat hygiene assessment program

pcs.text: Select samples for assessment according to approved sampling plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select samples for assessment according to approved sampling plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select samples for assessment according to approved sampling plan.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record defects using correct forms or electronic system.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement immediate corrective action for carcase defects.
